duplicateConflictBlockedCopyVisible: Blocked: this setting appears in more than one place. Resolve the duplicate entries manually before applying.
highRiskBlockedCopyVisible: Blocked: this setting needs a family-specific recovery path before the app can write it.
missingLineDefaultBlockedCopyVisible: Blocked: this setting is using Hyprland's default value. The app does not add new config lines yet.
reasonLiveUiNotPerformed: Source-level UI/accessibility wording proof was used to avoid any chance of interacting with Apply during blocker hardening.
scriptManagedBlockedCopyVisible: Blocked: this file may be changed by a script, so safe-batch writing is disabled.
symlinkManagedBlockedCopyVisible: Blocked: this file may be a symlink or current-profile file, so the app will not write it yet.
